scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,admin,portal -c cyan,green,magenta "cross-env PORT=3065 yarn workspace erp-effect-http-server dev" "cross-env VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3065 yarn workspace admin-web-app dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3066 --strictPort" "cross-env VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3065 yarn workspace user-portal-webapp dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3067 --strictPort"
scripts.build: yarn workspace erp-effect-http-server build && yarn workspace admin-web-app build && yarn workspace user-portal-webapp build
